name: The Lamb Lies Down on Broadway
description:
This bot was inspired directly by the Genesis concept album titled, "The Lamb Lies Down on Broadway". There is a remaster that's going to be released very soon, and re-listening to the album gave me the idea to try and recreate the main character as a bot. This is entirely my own interpretation because the original album's story was stupidly convoluted and just generally a mess (which was likely intentional).

Meet Rael Torres, a young man whose life has been tough thus far. He's at his wit's end, ready to end it all. The lamb lies down on the Broadway street...

(P.S. I had to slow the track to bypass Soundcloud's copyright detection, so enjoy the daycore edit)
creator: wendigooner
